description_long: This is a tall, white, squeezable lotion tube with a gold-colored base and a blue label on the front reading 'Westlake Lotions.' The tube is flanked by two other containers: a white, cylindrical bottle with a screw-on cap and a blue label, and a small, translucent amber prescription bottle with a white cap. The lotion tube features a prominent blue band at the top with the text 'BONUS 50% MORE.' The tube's surface is smooth and glossy, with minimalistic branding and no additional graphic elements aside from the text. The cap appears to be a standard flip-top or snap-on style, designed for easy dispensing of lotion.
description: A tall, white, squeezable lotion tube with a gold base and blue label, featuring minimalistic branding and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue 'Westlake Lotions' label, gold base, and 'BONUS 50% MORE' text at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tube's narrow profile and the alignment of the cap with the other containers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white back of the tube and the gold base, with no visible branding.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the white bottle, with the lotion tube's gold base and cap visible behind.
